items.alternatives: Ensure the rpdevops MCP server is configured and the AZDO_PAT secret is set in the repository with read access to the Consumer Solutions project on tfs.realpage.com.
items.reason: The rpdevops MCP server required to fetch Azure DevOps work item #1727233 is not available in this environment. Cannot retrieve work item content to perform evaluation.

items.body:
## Work Item Fetch Failed

**Work Item ID:** [#1727233](https://tfs.realpage.com/tfs/Realpage/Consumer%20Solutions/_workitems/edit/1727233)
**Date:** 2026-04-16
**Workflow Run:** [24490455707](https://github.com/kjadala/qa-aw-poc/actions/runs/24490455707)

---

## Error Details

The automated User Story Evaluation workflow could not retrieve work item **#1727233** from Azure DevOps because the **rpdevops MCP server** was not available or reachable in this execution environment.

---

## Troubleshooting Checklist

1. **`AZDO_PAT` secret** — Verify that the `AZDO_PAT` repository secret is configured with **read** access to the `Consumer Solutions` project on `tfs.realpage.com`.

2. **Network access** — Confirm that the GitHub Actions runner has outbound network access to:
   - `tfs.realpage.com`
   - `artifacts.realpage.com`

3. **Work Item ID** — Confirm that work item `1727233` exists in the **Consumer Solutions** project (`https://tfs.realpage.com/tfs/Realpage/Consumer%20Solutions`).

4. **rpdevops MCP server** — Ensure the rpdevops MCP server is properly configured and registered in the workflow environment so the `wit_get_work_item` tool is available.

---

Once the above issues are resolved, re-trigger the evaluation workflow with the same Work Item ID (`1727233`).
items.title: Work item fetch failed — #1727233
